signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY (Up from 2.00% in Feb)** | NO | HIGH confidence

South Korea's Statistics Korea released Consumer Price Index data on April 2, 2026, showing March 2026 year-over-year inflation at 2.16%, a 0.16 percentage point rise from February's 2.00%, with month-over-month inflation at 0.34%.[2] No announcements or resolutions have occurred since then
